original_name: This is a comprehensive Russian-language report designed on a dark blue dashboard, detailing additional features for the Quantum platform. It includes sections such as a goals summary, competitor research, feature plan, feature tables, UI mockups, key performance analytics, and forecasts—showing detailed product insights, implementation steps, and recommended actions, all organized in a sleek, corporate design.png

approval.source: User-approved ChatGPT File Library image; raw bytes re-uploaded by the user in the current conversation.

reference_regions: navigation: Центр решений, Аналитика, Финансы, Товары, Реклама, Склад и поставки, Конкуренты, SEO, Аналитик AI, Отчёты, Настройки
Decision Center header, filters and period selector

freeze.tamper_rule: Any byte or SHA-256 change revokes the freeze and requires explicit user approval plus a new protocol-amendment cycle.

limitations: The frozen reference is a report image containing the approved UI mockup; it is not evidence that the installed desktop UI matches it.
No UI implementation, packaged, installed or physical-path claim is made.
